checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 1668 divs with only 136 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 394/675 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 20/20 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
No h1 heading — page lacks a clear title for agents
20 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 612/632 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Proper 405 with Allow header: GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS

details.allow_header: GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~1,178,126 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 0% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 31 — deeply nested structure
Reading this page costs $1.47–$17.67 per load ($7.36–$88.36 for a 5-page session)
262 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, search
All 109 images have alt attributes (109 descriptive, 0 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
8 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 66ms
Moderate payload: 535KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: br
